kw.name: Open web browser by url
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "args": ["--start-maximized"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\kritidaj.j\\Documents\\GitHub\\assign-automation-mar-2026\\testcases\\web\\log_result\\browser\\traces\\temp\\d9836c76-8502-4986-bde6-428842281bb0"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": null }

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': False, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': None}
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.gother.online/th-th

kw.doc: ใช้สำหรับเปิด Web browser Arguments: - ${url} (string) ลิ้งของเว็ปที่ต้องการเปิด: https://google.com - ${supported_browser} (string) ระบบ Browser ที่รองรับ: chromium, firefox, webkit - False (bool) เปิด Browser ในโหมดไร้หน้าต่าง (No GUI): True or False

errors.msg: Error in file 'C:\Users\kritidaj.j\Documents\GitHub\assign-automation-mar-2026\resources\import.robot' on line 10: Processing variable file 'C:\Users\kritidaj.j\Documents\GitHub\assign-automation-mar-2026\resources\translation\web\th.yaml' failed: YAML variable file must be a mapping, got string.
